analysis_result: Per-sample nonsynonymous TMB across 18 MPNST WES samples (30 Mb denominator): median = 3.35 muts/Mb, mean = 2.82 muts/Mb (IQR [0.62, 4.13]; range [0.00, 6.47]). Restricted to nonsynonymous SNVs only: median = 3.17 muts/Mb, mean = 2.66 muts/Mb.
denominator_used: N = 18 MPNST samples with WES (15 MPNST + 3 Low-Grade MPNST); target space = 30 Mb (typical exome).
assumptions_made: Exome target size = 30 Mb; MPNST defined as Tumor Type in {MPNST, Low-Grade MPNST}; WES availability indicated by WES == 'X'; MAF Tumor_Sample_Barcode maps to clinical WES label as 'Tumor_' + label; Nonsynonymous set per question: Missense/Nonsense/Frame_Shift_Ins/Frame_Shift_Del/In_Frame_Ins/In_Frame_Del/Splice_Site/Translation_Start_Site/Nonstop_Mutation; FILTER=='PASS' applied (all 7457 rows already PASS); Samples with zero nonsynonymous mutations retained in denominator; Primary TMB uses all nonsynonymous variant types (standard TMB); secondary uses only Variant_Type=='SNP' per literal 'SNVs' phrasing.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- Clinical Data (MOESM4): 108 rows; used columns Tumor_ID, Tumor Type, WES, WES label.
- MAF (MOESM5 'Supplementary Table 2'): 7457 rows x 123 cols. FILTER column is uniformly 'PASS' (7457/7457). Variant_Classification and Tumor_Sample_Barcode used.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Start with Clinical Data (N=108).
- Filter 1: Tumor Type in {'MPNST','Low-Grade MPNST'} -> 19 samples.
- Filter 2: WES == 'X' (has WES data) -> 18 samples.
- Mapping: MAF Tumor_Sample_Barcode = 'Tumor_' + WES label.
- All 18 MPNST WES samples present in MAF.

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Nonsynonymous set: {Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Ins, Frame_Shift_Del, In_Frame_Ins, In_Frame_Del, Splice_Site, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation}.
- Denominator: 30 Mb (typical exome footprint).
- Samples with zero nonsyn mutations are retained with count 0 in the denominator of 18 samples.

D. COMPUTATION
- FILTER == 'PASS' -> 7457 rows (all MAF rows pass).
- Keep nonsynonymous Variant_Classification -> 5067 rows.
- Restrict Tumor_Sample_Barcode to 18 MPNST WES barcodes -> 1521 rows.
- Per-sample count / 30 Mb = TMB per sample.
- Report median and mean across 18 MPNST samples.

E. RESULT (all nonsynonymous variants; primary)
- N = 18 MPNST samples (15 MPNST + 3 Low-Grade MPNST with WES).
- Total nonsyn variants across cohort: 1521.
- Per-sample nonsyn TMB: median = 3.350 muts/Mb; mean = 2.817 muts/Mb.
- IQR: [0.617, 4.133]; range [0.000, 6.467]; SD 2.129.

E (secondary). Restricted to SNVs only (Variant_Type=='SNP')
- Median = 3.167 muts/Mb; Mean = 2.661 muts/Mb.

F. CAVEATS
- 30 Mb denominator is an assumption of typical exome target size; paper may use a different captured size which would linearly rescale results.
- 'Low-Grade MPNST' (n=3) is included per the MPNST definition; excluding them would change the median/mean but the direction is unchanged.
- FILTER column contains only 'PASS' values in this MAF so the FILTER filter is a no-op.
- Tumor_1349 was one of the hypermutated samples driving the mean above the median; median is the more robust summary.
